mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CODE_DETAIL ( GROUP_CODE, CODE_VALUE, CODE_NAME, SORT_SEQ ) VALUES ( #{groupCode}, #{codeValue}, #{codeName}, #{sortSeq} )
mapper.select: SELECT NVL(MAX(SORT_SEQ), 0) FROM CODE_DETAIL WHERE GROUP_CODE = #{groupCode}
SELECT GROUP_CODE, CODE_VALUE, CODE_NAME, SORT_SEQ, USE_YN, REG_DATE FROM CODE_DETAIL ORDER BY GROUP_CODE ASC, SORT_SEQ ASC
SELECT GROUP_CODE, CODE_VALUE, CODE_NAME, SORT_SEQ, USE_YN, REG_DATE FROM CODE_DETAIL WHERE GROUP_CODE = #{groupCode} AND CODE_VALUE = #{codeValue}
